title: America's Big Ideas Coloring Adventure
description: A simple coloring page introducing young learners to basic American founding principles through child-friendly imagery and simple explanations.
instructions: Color each picture. Ask a grown-up to read the facts to learn about America's important ideas!

content.image: A large outline drawing with several distinct sections: (1) A Liberty Bell in the center, (2) Children of different backgrounds holding hands in a circle, (3) A simple ballot box with a paper being inserted, (4) An eagle holding an olive branch, (5) A simple scale representing justice.

elements.name: Liberty Bell
elements.description: Color the Liberty Bell yellow or gold. It rings for freedom!

elements.name: Children Circle
elements.description: Color the children with different skin colors to show that everyone is equal

elements.name: Voting Box
elements.description: Color the voting box blue to show how we choose our leaders

elements.name: Peace Eagle
elements.description: Color the eagle brown and the olive branch green to represent peace

elements.name: Justice Scales
elements.description: Color the scales gold to show fairness for everyone

learningFacts: America was founded on the idea that all people are created equal
In America, people choose their leaders by voting
Freedom means people can speak their ideas
Like some ancient civilizations, America believes in justice and fairness
America's ideas about freedom began over 200 years ago
